name: 高家婚堂
era_style: 明代婚礼装饰的官宦府邸正厅
description: 与正堂相同结构，但为婚礼特别布置：满堂红绸喜幛悬挂，地面铺设红色喜毯，中央设拜堂香案，上置龙凤喜烛和大红喜字。两侧点缀花灯和绸缎装饰，空间喜庆热烈却又庄重，保留原有红木家具作为背景。
visual_reference: Ornate Ming dynasty Chinese wedding ceremony hall in wealthy official residence, red silk draperies and happy characters everywhere, red carpet on floor, central altar with dragon-phoenix candles, traditional redwood furniture in background, festive yet solemn, detailed red decorations, warm interior
visual_prompt_negative: modern wedding elements, western suits, electric lights, blurry, low resolution
atmosphere: 喜庆庄重, 心不在焉
lighting: 白天结合自然光与喜烛火光，温暖明亮突出红色调
emotional_range: 婚礼仪式的正式喜庆到女主怔愣与内心复杂
